introSection: Piraten is a steel roller coaster located in Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. Opened in 2008, it was manufactured by Intamin with design of Ing.-Büro Stengel GmbH and onsite construction by RCS GmbH.
fullText:
Piraten is a steel roller coaster located in Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. Opened in 2008, it was manufactured by Intamin with design of Ing.-Büro Stengel GmbH and onsite construction by RCS GmbH.



Grey track and brown supports.
